Variant

Videos QC Guidelines

  1. Product details shown in the video must match the listing images and attributes.
  2. Video should be high quality with the product clearly visible.
  3. Audio should be only in English or Hindi.
  4. Recommended video aspect ratio is 3:4 for full visibility on the Flipkart customer platform.
  5. Video should not contain excessive background noise.
  6. Do not use movie audio or copyrighted music.
  7. Do not include social media handles, tags, or influencer promotions.
  8. Do not include competitor or other website names, logos, QR codes, or promotional mentions.
  9. Video should not contain watermarks or copyright text.
  10. Do not mention prices, offers, or discounts in the video.
